title: Better Dark Mode
description: Enhanced dark mode designed for comfort without changing the original Minecraft experience
body:
# Better Dark Mode
![in game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3bea36901b25ba4037c8daa854d1c56cccace169.png)
 **This Resource Pack** is designed to deliver a cleaner, darker, and more comfortable visual experience without changing the core feel of Minecraft.
 
**It enhances dark mode elements by improving contrast**, readability, and consistency across menus, UI, and textures, making long play sessions easier on the eyes.

**The pack carefully refines existing visuals rather than replacing them**, ensuring that everything still feels familiar and authentic. Colors are balanced to stay true to vanilla Minecraft while offering a smoother and more modern dark appearance.

Whether you are playing Survival, Creative, or Multiplayer, this resource pack maintains full compatibility and does not affect gameplay mechanics or performance. It is lightweight, simple, and focused on visual comfort.

Perfect for players who enjoy **dark themes and want a subtle improvemen**t that respects the original Minecraft experience, this pack brings clarity, style, and immersion without distraction.
